title: amblynotus davuricus
intro: Amblynotus davuricus, also known as Daurian marigold or Korean marigold, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Amblynotus davuricus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies.
